records.m_Talk_ENG: Oho, so this is the device made by the Lotus's Senior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oho, so this is the device made by the Lotus's Senior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oho, so this is the device made by the Lotus's Senior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An implosion reactor? Is this based on the Eternium Drive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An implosion reactor? Is this based on the Eternium Drive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An implosion reactor? Is this based on the Eternium Drive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, the rumor about you being a genius was true. You replicated the Eternium Drive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, the rumor about you being a genius was true. You replicated the Eternium Drive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, the rumor about you being a genius was true. You replicated the Eternium Drive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I knew it! Machine Collector, I figured you would notice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I knew it! Machine Collector, I figured you would notice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I knew it! Machine Collector, I figured you would notice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You realized right away that the Track Switcher referenced the Eternium Drive, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You realized right away that the Track Switcher referenced the Eternium Drive, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You realized right away that the Track Switcher referenced the Eternium Drive, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those idiots looked lost no matter how many times I explained it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those idiots looked lost no matter how many times I explained it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those idiots looked lost no matter how many times I explained it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: To lock a genius like this in a ghost-ridden city and dump only chores on her...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To lock a genius like this in a ghost-ridden city and dump only chores on her...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To lock a genius like this in a ghost-ridden city and dump only chores on her...

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a senior in engineering, isn't it painful to see a junior stuck like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a senior in engineering, isn't it painful to see a junior stuck like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a senior in engineering, isn't it painful to see a junior stuck like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no interest in human trifles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no interest in human trifles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no interest in human trifles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I care only for my endless evolution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I care only for my endless evolution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I care only for my endless evolution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior, we completed the Track Switcher at my <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior, we completed the Track Switcher at my <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior, we completed the Track Switcher at my <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Colossus Base?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Colossus Base?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Colossus Base?

records.m_Talk_ENG: President Shin Jia made it sound like Alphatrix owned that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: President Shin Jia made it sound like Alphatrix owned that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: President Shin Jia made it sound like Alphatrix owned that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I seized their Orbital Base.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I seized their Orbital Base.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I seized their Orbital Base.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I joined the Qliphoth Game and aided you in order to obtain it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I joined the Qliphoth Game and aided you in order to obtain it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I joined the Qliphoth Game and aided you in order to obtain it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're the leader of Scavengers, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're the leader of Scavengers, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're the leader of Scavengers, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those clean straight lines, that rugged body, the heavy weapons!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those clean straight lines, that rugged body, the heavy weapons!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those clean straight lines, that rugged body, the heavy weapons!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-can I touch it just once?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-can I touch it just once?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-can I touch it just once?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She seems to be ignoring what you are saying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She seems to be ignoring what you are saying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She seems to be ignoring what you are saying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isolde, could you remember this one thing for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isolde, could you remember this one thing for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isolde, could you remember this one thing for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on to these words and use them to protect the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on to these words and use them to protect the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on to these words and use them to protect the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oho...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oho...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oho...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't mind, may I take a look at your core?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't mind, may I take a look at your core?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't mind, may I take a look at your core?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, from a machine's point of view, would that feel like showing your bare body?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, from a machine's point of view, would that feel like showing your bare body?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, from a machine's point of view, would that feel like showing your bare body?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it is fine! With my skill, I can open and close it so cleanly you won't even feel it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it is fine! With my skill, I can open and close it so cleanly you won't even feel it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it is fine! With my skill, I can open and close it so cleanly you won't even feel it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I take back what I said about feeling sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I take back what I said about feeling sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I take back what I said about feeling sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Track Switcher has already been handed to the monster and transport has begun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Track Switcher has already been handed to the monster and transport has begun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Track Switcher has already been handed to the monster and transport has begun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, while reviewing the Track Switcher design, I found one problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, while reviewing the Track Switcher design, I found one problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, while reviewing the Track Switcher design, I found one problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A p-problem?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A p-problem?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A p-problem?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way my perfect design has a flaw.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way my perfect design has a flaw.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way my perfect design has a flaw.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is the fatal mistake engineers like you make sooner or later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is the fatal mistake engineers like you make sooner or later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is the fatal mistake engineers like you make sooner or later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The things you assume are so obvious that you do not even notice them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The things you assume are so obvious that you do not even notice them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The things you assume are so obvious that you do not even notice them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is that supposed to mean...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is that supposed to mean...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is that supposed to mean...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The review was perfect! There can't be anything I missed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The review was perfect! There can't be anything I missed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The review was perfect! There can't be anything I missed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hear the Track Switcher is meant to disrupt the Demon Lord's dimension-jumping coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hear the Track Switcher is meant to disrupt the Demon Lord's dimension-jumping coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hear the Track Switcher is meant to disrupt the Demon Lord's dimension-jumping coordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And to delay the Demon Lord's advance, a large amount of Eternium is needed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And to delay the Demon Lord's advance, a large amount of Eternium is needed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And to delay the Demon Lord's advance, a large amount of Eternium is needed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Eternium spontaneously reacts once it exceeds its critical mass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Eternium spontaneously reacts once it exceeds its critical mass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Eternium spontaneously reacts once it exceeds its critical mass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have a way to solve the problem that this causes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have a way to solve the problem that this causes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have a way to solve the problem that this causes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? P-problem?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? P-problem?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? P-problem?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... If we're talking about activation... Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... If we're talking about activation... Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... If we're talking about activation... Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaagh! How could a genius like me make such a blunder?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaagh! How could a genius like me make such a blunder?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaagh! How could a genius like me make such a blunder?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you figured out what the problem is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you figured out what the problem is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you figured out what the problem is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is very simple. You cannot contain a large mass of Eternium in one place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is very simple. You cannot contain a large mass of Eternium in one place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is very simple. You cannot contain a large mass of Eternium in one place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you do, the dimension surface here will melt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you do, the dimension surface here will melt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you do, the dimension surface here will melt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the energy the Track Switcher needs far exceeds the amount of Eternium this space can contain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the energy the Track Switcher needs far exceeds the amount of Eternium this space can contain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the energy the Track Switcher needs far exceeds the amount of Eternium this space can contain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then what should we...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then what should we...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then what should we...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm yourself, Senior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm yourself, Senior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm yourself, Senior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only wanted your answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only wanted your answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only wanted your answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right... calm down, Isolde...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right... calm down, Isolde...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right... calm down, Isolde...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have the ability to multi-think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have the ability to multi-think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have the ability to multi-think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you start working out countermeasures now, you will come up with one quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you start working out countermeasures now, you will come up with one quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you start working out countermeasures now, you will come up with one quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most dimension surface meltdown incidents happened when Eternium was activated all at once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most dimension surface meltdown incidents happened when Eternium was activated all at once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most dimension surface meltdown incidents happened when Eternium was activated all at once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you activate it in a single step, running the Track Switcher will be pointless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you activate it in a single step, running the Track Switcher will be pointless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you activate it in a single step, running the Track Switcher will be pointless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To the Demon Lord, this world would look like an empty house you can enter from anywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To the Demon Lord, this world would look like an empty house you can enter from anywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To the Demon Lord, this world would look like an empty house you can enter from anywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must raise output in stages to minimize the dimension surface loss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must raise output in stages to minimize the dimension surface loss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must raise output in stages to minimize the dimension surface loss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will take some time, similar to how a ship ramps up an Eternium Drive...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will take some time, similar to how a ship ramps up an Eternium Drive...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will take some time, similar to how a ship ramps up an Eternium Drive...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That approach is impractical for combat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That approach is impractical for combat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That approach is impractical for combat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gradually increasing output would help stabilize the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gradually increasing output would help stabilize the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gradually increasing output would help stabilize the dimension surface.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But did you consider that the moment you activate Eternium, the enemy will notice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But did you consider that the moment you activate Eternium, the enemy will notice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But did you consider that the moment you activate Eternium, the enemy will notice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your escort would be forced to defend you again under that constraint,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your escort would be forced to defend you again under that constraint,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your escort would be forced to defend you again under that constraint,

records.m_Talk_ENG: and the Track Switcher would be destroyed along with your death. The operation would fail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: and the Track Switcher would be destroyed along with your death. The operation would fail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: and the Track Switcher would be destroyed along with your death. The operation would fail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't know without trying! How can you be so certain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't know without trying! How can you be so certain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't know without trying! How can you be so certain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because it is obvious even without crunching causality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because it is obvious even without crunching causality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because it is obvious even without crunching causality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need a system that can rapidly restore the dimension surface loss even when output spikes at once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need a system that can rapidly restore the dimension surface loss even when output spikes at once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need a system that can rapidly restore the dimension surface loss even when output spikes at once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is not enough time to raise output step by step.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is not enough time to raise output step by step.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is not enough time to raise output step by step.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then use that vaunted AI brain of yours and figure out how to stabilize the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then use that vaunted AI brain of yours and figure out how to stabilize the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then use that vaunted AI brain of yours and figure out how to stabilize the dimension surface.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm talking about the most feasible method...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm talking about the most feasible method...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm talking about the most feasible method...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anything beyond that is still just theory!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anything beyond that is still just theory!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anything beyond that is still just theory!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have heard the rumors that the Lotus's Senior is a genius.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have heard the rumors that the Lotus's Senior is a genius.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have heard the rumors that the Lotus's Senior is a genius.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No doubt you considered countless possibilities before settling on that answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No doubt you considered countless possibilities before settling on that answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No doubt you considered countless possibilities before settling on that answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You discarded the ones that were too reckless or unrealistic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You discarded the ones that were too reckless or unrealistic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You discarded the ones that were too reckless or unrealistic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly. If it's reckless or unrealistic, the chance of success is low.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly. If it's reckless or unrealistic, the chance of success is low.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly. If it's reckless or unrealistic, the chance of success is low.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An engineer must build what is actually feasible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An engineer must build what is actually feasible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An engineer must build what is actually feasible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Purely fanciful theories rarely help people live their lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Purely fanciful theories rarely help people live their lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Purely fanciful theories rarely help people live their lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the Counterside first appeared and C.O.s emerged, people dismissed it as nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the Counterside first appeared and C.O.s emerged, people dismissed it as nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the Counterside first appeared and C.O.s emerged, people dismissed it as nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the Future-at-War project began, people only complained and criticized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the Future-at-War project began, people only complained and criticized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the Future-at-War project began, people only complained and criticized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet in the end, Future-at-War became an academic ideal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet in the end, Future-at-War became an academic ideal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet in the end, Future-at-War became an academic ideal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The original Titan was successfully activated and even now protects people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The original Titan was successfully activated and even now protects people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The original Titan was successfully activated and even now protects people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior of Lotus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior of Lotus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior of Lotus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To change the world, what was called fantasy must be turned into possibilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To change the world, what was called fantasy must be turned into possibilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To change the world, what was called fantasy must be turned into possibilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An engineer must turn theory into reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An engineer must turn theory into reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An engineer must turn theory into reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think again and derive your answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think again and derive your answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think again and derive your answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>An engineer turns theory into reality.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>An engineer turns theory into reality.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>An engineer turns theory into reality.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: I named that very change "evolution."
records.m_Talk_DEU: I named that very change "evolution."
records.m_Talk_FRA: I named that very change "evolution."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Human potential evolves by making the seemingly impossible possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Human potential evolves by making the seemingly impossible possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Human potential evolves by making the seemingly impossible possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, show me you can evolve one step further.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, show me you can evolve one step further.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, show me you can evolve one step further.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prove that humanity has not yet reached its limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prove that humanity has not yet reached its limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prove that humanity has not yet reached its limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Everything you need, the <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color> will provide
8g no...
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Everything you need, the <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color> will provide
8g no...
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Everything you need, the <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color> will provide
8g no...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I</color> will provide it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I</color> will provide it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I</color> will provide it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-fine. Since you put it that way... just do not laugh when you hear it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-fine. Since you put it that way... just do not laugh when you hear it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-fine. Since you put it that way... just do not laugh when you hear it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The way a dimension surface collapses under Eternium load is similar to a gravitational collapse forming a black hole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The way a dimension surface collapses under Eternium load is similar to a gravitational collapse forming a black hole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The way a dimension surface collapses under Eternium load is similar to a gravitational collapse forming a black hole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as gravity affects spacetime, Eternium affects spacetime and even dimensions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as gravity affects spacetime, Eternium affects spacetime and even dimensions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as gravity affects spacetime, Eternium affects spacetime and even dimensions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's where the problem begins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's where the problem begins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's where the problem begins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With our current technology we can't direct all activated energy exactly where we want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With our current technology we can't direct all activated energy exactly where we want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With our current technology we can't direct all activated energy exactly where we want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The residual energy with nowhere to go distorts spacetime and dimensions, melting the surface.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The residual energy with nowhere to go distorts spacetime and dimensions, melting the surface.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The residual energy with nowhere to go distorts spacetime and dimensions, melting the surface.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I devised a kind of auxiliary dimensional stasis field.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I devised a kind of auxiliary dimensional stasis field.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I devised a kind of auxiliary dimensional stasis field.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would transmit Eternium's energy fully beyond our dimension while shielding our world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would transmit Eternium's energy fully beyond our dimension while shielding our world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would transmit Eternium's energy fully beyond our dimension while shielding our world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In theory it works, but it needs exceedingly delicate design, and the system architecture must be rebuilt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In theory it works, but it needs exceedingly delicate design, and the system architecture must be rebuilt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In theory it works, but it needs exceedingly delicate design, and the system architecture must be rebuilt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means changing the Eternium yield formula... and if we recalculate the build time for the system...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means changing the Eternium yield formula... and if we recalculate the build time for the system...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means changing the Eternium yield formula... and if we recalculate the build time for the system...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is your name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is your name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is your name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would like to know the name of the engineer who will change the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would like to know the name of the engineer who will change the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would like to know the name of the engineer who will change the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isolde... I'm Isolde.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isolde... I'm Isolde.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isolde... I'm Isolde.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to calculate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to calculate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to calculate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment your theory gained viability, preparations for realization were complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment your theory gained viability, preparations for realization were complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment your theory gained viability, preparations for realization were complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds like the final piece has arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds like the final piece has arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds like the final piece has arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let us go out and see for ourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let us go out and see for ourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let us go out and see for ourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will begin preparing the system build inside the hangar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will begin preparing the system build inside the hangar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will begin preparing the system build inside the hangar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! It's been ages since I've been to a desert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! It's been ages since I've been to a desert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! It's been ages since I've been to a desert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like things are not exactly rosy here either, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like things are not exactly rosy here either, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like things are not exactly rosy here either, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, finding any place untouched in a crisis like this would be the real miracle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, finding any place untouched in a crisis like this would be the real miracle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, finding any place untouched in a crisis like this would be the real miracle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? And you are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? And you are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? And you are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Frizzy, prickly hair, hollow eyes, skin gone pale from never seeing sunlight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Frizzy, prickly hair, hollow eyes, skin gone pale from never seeing sunlight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Frizzy, prickly hair, hollow eyes, skin gone pale from never seeing sunlight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And above all, a killer body that can drop 'em in seconds!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And above all, a killer body that can drop 'em in seconds!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And above all, a killer body that can drop 'em in seconds!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Matches the description I heard of the Senior to a tee!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Matches the description I heard of the Senior to a tee!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Matches the description I heard of the Senior to a tee!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pleased to meet you. Name's Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pleased to meet you. Name's Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pleased to meet you. Name's Mi Rinae.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oho, so this is the device made by the Lotus's Senior?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oho, so this is the device made by the Lotus's Senior?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oho, so this is the device made by the Lotus's Senior?

root.m_Talk_ENG: An implosion reactor? Is this based on the Eternium Drive?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An implosion reactor? Is this based on the Eternium Drive?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An implosion reactor? Is this based on the Eternium Drive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, the rumor about you being a genius was true. You replicated the Eternium Drive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, the rumor about you being a genius was true. You replicated the Eternium Drive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, the rumor about you being a genius was true. You replicated the Eternium Drive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I knew it! Machine Collector, I figured you would notice!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I knew it! Machine Collector, I figured you would notice!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I knew it! Machine Collector, I figured you would notice!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You realized right away that the Track Switcher referenced the Eternium Drive, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You realized right away that the Track Switcher referenced the Eternium Drive, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You realized right away that the Track Switcher referenced the Eternium Drive, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those idiots looked lost no matter how many times I explained it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those idiots looked lost no matter how many times I explained it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those idiots looked lost no matter how many times I explained it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: To lock a genius like this in a ghost-ridden city and dump only chores on her...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To lock a genius like this in a ghost-ridden city and dump only chores on her...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To lock a genius like this in a ghost-ridden city and dump only chores on her...

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a senior in engineering, isn't it painful to see a junior stuck like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a senior in engineering, isn't it painful to see a junior stuck like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a senior in engineering, isn't it painful to see a junior stuck like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no interest in human trifles.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no interest in human trifles.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no interest in human trifles.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I care only for my endless evolution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I care only for my endless evolution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I care only for my endless evolution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior, we completed the Track Switcher at my <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior, we completed the Track Switcher at my <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior, we completed the Track Switcher at my <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-Colossus Base?
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-Colossus Base?
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-Colossus Base?

root.m_Talk_ENG: President Shin Jia made it sound like Alphatrix owned that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: President Shin Jia made it sound like Alphatrix owned that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: President Shin Jia made it sound like Alphatrix owned that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I seized their Orbital Base.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I seized their Orbital Base.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I seized their Orbital Base.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I joined the Qliphoth Game and aided you in order to obtain it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I joined the Qliphoth Game and aided you in order to obtain it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I joined the Qliphoth Game and aided you in order to obtain it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're the leader of Scavengers, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're the leader of Scavengers, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're the leader of Scavengers, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those clean straight lines, that rugged body, the heavy weapons!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those clean straight lines, that rugged body, the heavy weapons!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those clean straight lines, that rugged body, the heavy weapons!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-can I touch it just once?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-can I touch it just once?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-can I touch it just once?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She seems to be ignoring what you are saying.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She seems to be ignoring what you are saying.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She seems to be ignoring what you are saying.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that voice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that voice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that voice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isolde, could you remember this one thing for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isolde, could you remember this one thing for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isolde, could you remember this one thing for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on to these words and use them to protect the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on to these words and use them to protect the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on to these words and use them to protect the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oho...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oho...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oho...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't mind, may I take a look at your core?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't mind, may I take a look at your core?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't mind, may I take a look at your core?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, from a machine's point of view, would that feel like showing your bare body?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, from a machine's point of view, would that feel like showing your bare body?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, from a machine's point of view, would that feel like showing your bare body?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-it is fine! With my skill, I can open and close it so cleanly you won't even feel it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-it is fine! With my skill, I can open and close it so cleanly you won't even feel it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-it is fine! With my skill, I can open and close it so cleanly you won't even feel it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I take back what I said about feeling sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I take back what I said about feeling sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I take back what I said about feeling sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Track Switcher has already been handed to the monster and transport has begun.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Track Switcher has already been handed to the monster and transport has begun.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Track Switcher has already been handed to the monster and transport has begun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, while reviewing the Track Switcher design, I found one problem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, while reviewing the Track Switcher design, I found one problem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, while reviewing the Track Switcher design, I found one problem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A p-problem?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A p-problem?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A p-problem?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way my perfect design has a flaw.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way my perfect design has a flaw.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way my perfect design has a flaw.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is the fatal mistake engineers like you make sooner or later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is the fatal mistake engineers like you make sooner or later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is the fatal mistake engineers like you make sooner or later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The things you assume are so obvious that you do not even notice them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The things you assume are so obvious that you do not even notice them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The things you assume are so obvious that you do not even notice them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is that supposed to mean...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is that supposed to mean...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is that supposed to mean...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The review was perfect! There can't be anything I missed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The review was perfect! There can't be anything I missed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The review was perfect! There can't be anything I missed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hear the Track Switcher is meant to disrupt the Demon Lord's dimension-jumping coordinates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hear the Track Switcher is meant to disrupt the Demon Lord's dimension-jumping coordinates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hear the Track Switcher is meant to disrupt the Demon Lord's dimension-jumping coordinates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And to delay the Demon Lord's advance, a large amount of Eternium is needed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And to delay the Demon Lord's advance, a large amount of Eternium is needed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And to delay the Demon Lord's advance, a large amount of Eternium is needed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Eternium spontaneously reacts once it exceeds its critical mass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Eternium spontaneously reacts once it exceeds its critical mass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Eternium spontaneously reacts once it exceeds its critical mass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have a way to solve the problem that this causes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have a way to solve the problem that this causes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have a way to solve the problem that this causes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? P-problem?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? P-problem?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? P-problem?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... If we're talking about activation... Well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... If we're talking about activation... Well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... If we're talking about activation... Well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaagh! How could a genius like me make such a blunder?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaagh! How could a genius like me make such a blunder?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaagh! How could a genius like me make such a blunder?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you figured out what the problem is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you figured out what the problem is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you figured out what the problem is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is very simple. You cannot contain a large mass of Eternium in one place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is very simple. You cannot contain a large mass of Eternium in one place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is very simple. You cannot contain a large mass of Eternium in one place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you do, the dimension surface here will melt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you do, the dimension surface here will melt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you do, the dimension surface here will melt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the energy the Track Switcher needs far exceeds the amount of Eternium this space can contain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the energy the Track Switcher needs far exceeds the amount of Eternium this space can contain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the energy the Track Switcher needs far exceeds the amount of Eternium this space can contain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then what should we...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then what should we...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then what should we...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm yourself, Senior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm yourself, Senior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm yourself, Senior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I only wanted your answer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I only wanted your answer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I only wanted your answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right... calm down, Isolde...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right... calm down, Isolde...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right... calm down, Isolde...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have the ability to multi-think.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have the ability to multi-think.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have the ability to multi-think.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you start working out countermeasures now, you will come up with one quickly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you start working out countermeasures now, you will come up with one quickly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you start working out countermeasures now, you will come up with one quickly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Most dimension surface meltdown incidents happened when Eternium was activated all at once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Most dimension surface meltdown incidents happened when Eternium was activated all at once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Most dimension surface meltdown incidents happened when Eternium was activated all at once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you activate it in a single step, running the Track Switcher will be pointless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you activate it in a single step, running the Track Switcher will be pointless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you activate it in a single step, running the Track Switcher will be pointless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To the Demon Lord, this world would look like an empty house you can enter from anywhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To the Demon Lord, this world would look like an empty house you can enter from anywhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To the Demon Lord, this world would look like an empty house you can enter from anywhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must raise output in stages to minimize the dimension surface loss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must raise output in stages to minimize the dimension surface loss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must raise output in stages to minimize the dimension surface loss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It will take some time, similar to how a ship ramps up an Eternium Drive...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It will take some time, similar to how a ship ramps up an Eternium Drive...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It will take some time, similar to how a ship ramps up an Eternium Drive...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That approach is impractical for combat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That approach is impractical for combat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That approach is impractical for combat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gradually increasing output would help stabilize the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gradually increasing output would help stabilize the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gradually increasing output would help stabilize the dimension surface.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But did you consider that the moment you activate Eternium, the enemy will notice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But did you consider that the moment you activate Eternium, the enemy will notice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But did you consider that the moment you activate Eternium, the enemy will notice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your escort would be forced to defend you again under that constraint,
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your escort would be forced to defend you again under that constraint,
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your escort would be forced to defend you again under that constraint,

root.m_Talk_ENG: and the Track Switcher would be destroyed along with your death. The operation would fail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: and the Track Switcher would be destroyed along with your death. The operation would fail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: and the Track Switcher would be destroyed along with your death. The operation would fail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't know without trying! How can you be so certain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't know without trying! How can you be so certain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't know without trying! How can you be so certain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because it is obvious even without crunching causality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because it is obvious even without crunching causality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because it is obvious even without crunching causality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need a system that can rapidly restore the dimension surface loss even when output spikes at once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need a system that can rapidly restore the dimension surface loss even when output spikes at once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need a system that can rapidly restore the dimension surface loss even when output spikes at once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is not enough time to raise output step by step.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is not enough time to raise output step by step.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is not enough time to raise output step by step.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, is that so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, is that so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, is that so?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then use that vaunted AI brain of yours and figure out how to stabilize the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then use that vaunted AI brain of yours and figure out how to stabilize the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then use that vaunted AI brain of yours and figure out how to stabilize the dimension surface.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm talking about the most feasible method...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm talking about the most feasible method...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm talking about the most feasible method...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anything beyond that is still just theory!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anything beyond that is still just theory!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anything beyond that is still just theory!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have heard the rumors that the Lotus's Senior is a genius.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have heard the rumors that the Lotus's Senior is a genius.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have heard the rumors that the Lotus's Senior is a genius.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No doubt you considered countless possibilities before settling on that answer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No doubt you considered countless possibilities before settling on that answer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No doubt you considered countless possibilities before settling on that answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You discarded the ones that were too reckless or unrealistic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You discarded the ones that were too reckless or unrealistic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You discarded the ones that were too reckless or unrealistic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly. If it's reckless or unrealistic, the chance of success is low.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly. If it's reckless or unrealistic, the chance of success is low.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly. If it's reckless or unrealistic, the chance of success is low.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An engineer must build what is actually feasible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An engineer must build what is actually feasible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An engineer must build what is actually feasible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Purely fanciful theories rarely help people live their lives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Purely fanciful theories rarely help people live their lives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Purely fanciful theories rarely help people live their lives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the Counterside first appeared and C.O.s emerged, people dismissed it as nonsense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the Counterside first appeared and C.O.s emerged, people dismissed it as nonsense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the Counterside first appeared and C.O.s emerged, people dismissed it as nonsense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the Future-at-War project began, people only complained and criticized.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the Future-at-War project began, people only complained and criticized.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the Future-at-War project began, people only complained and criticized.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yet in the end, Future-at-War became an academic ideal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yet in the end, Future-at-War became an academic ideal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yet in the end, Future-at-War became an academic ideal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The original Titan was successfully activated and even now protects people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The original Titan was successfully activated and even now protects people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The original Titan was successfully activated and even now protects people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior of Lotus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior of Lotus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior of Lotus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To change the world, what was called fantasy must be turned into possibilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To change the world, what was called fantasy must be turned into possibilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To change the world, what was called fantasy must be turned into possibilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An engineer must turn theory into reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An engineer must turn theory into reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An engineer must turn theory into reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Think again and derive your answer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Think again and derive your answer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Think again and derive your answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>An engineer turns theory into reality.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>An engineer turns theory into reality.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>An engineer turns theory into reality.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: I named that very change "evolution."
root.m_Talk_DEU: I named that very change "evolution."
root.m_Talk_FRA: I named that very change "evolution."

root.m_Talk_ENG: Human potential evolves by making the seemingly impossible possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Human potential evolves by making the seemingly impossible possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Human potential evolves by making the seemingly impossible possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, show me you can evolve one step further.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, show me you can evolve one step further.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, show me you can evolve one step further.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Prove that humanity has not yet reached its limit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Prove that humanity has not yet reached its limit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Prove that humanity has not yet reached its limit.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Everything you need, the <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color> will provide
8g no...
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Everything you need, the <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color> will provide
8g no...
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Everything you need, the <color=#ffd34c>Colossus Base</color> will provide
8g no...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I</color> will provide it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I</color> will provide it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I</color> will provide it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-fine. Since you put it that way... just do not laugh when you hear it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-fine. Since you put it that way... just do not laugh when you hear it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-fine. Since you put it that way... just do not laugh when you hear it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The way a dimension surface collapses under Eternium load is similar to a gravitational collapse forming a black hole.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The way a dimension surface collapses under Eternium load is similar to a gravitational collapse forming a black hole.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The way a dimension surface collapses under Eternium load is similar to a gravitational collapse forming a black hole.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as gravity affects spacetime, Eternium affects spacetime and even dimensions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as gravity affects spacetime, Eternium affects spacetime and even dimensions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as gravity affects spacetime, Eternium affects spacetime and even dimensions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's where the problem begins.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's where the problem begins.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's where the problem begins.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With our current technology we can't direct all activated energy exactly where we want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With our current technology we can't direct all activated energy exactly where we want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With our current technology we can't direct all activated energy exactly where we want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The residual energy with nowhere to go distorts spacetime and dimensions, melting the surface.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The residual energy with nowhere to go distorts spacetime and dimensions, melting the surface.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The residual energy with nowhere to go distorts spacetime and dimensions, melting the surface.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I devised a kind of auxiliary dimensional stasis field.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I devised a kind of auxiliary dimensional stasis field.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I devised a kind of auxiliary dimensional stasis field.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would transmit Eternium's energy fully beyond our dimension while shielding our world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It would transmit Eternium's energy fully beyond our dimension while shielding our world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It would transmit Eternium's energy fully beyond our dimension while shielding our world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In theory it works, but it needs exceedingly delicate design, and the system architecture must be rebuilt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In theory it works, but it needs exceedingly delicate design, and the system architecture must be rebuilt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In theory it works, but it needs exceedingly delicate design, and the system architecture must be rebuilt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That means changing the Eternium yield formula... and if we recalculate the build time for the system...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That means changing the Eternium yield formula... and if we recalculate the build time for the system...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That means changing the Eternium yield formula... and if we recalculate the build time for the system...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is your name?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is your name?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is your name?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would like to know the name of the engineer who will change the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would like to know the name of the engineer who will change the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would like to know the name of the engineer who will change the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isolde... I'm Isolde.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isolde... I'm Isolde.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isolde... I'm Isolde.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to calculate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to calculate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to calculate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment your theory gained viability, preparations for realization were complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment your theory gained viability, preparations for realization were complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment your theory gained viability, preparations for realization were complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds like the final piece has arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds like the final piece has arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds like the final piece has arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let us go out and see for ourselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let us go out and see for ourselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let us go out and see for ourselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will begin preparing the system build inside the hangar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will begin preparing the system build inside the hangar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will begin preparing the system build inside the hangar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! It's been ages since I've been to a desert.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! It's been ages since I've been to a desert.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! It's been ages since I've been to a desert.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like things are not exactly rosy here either, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like things are not exactly rosy here either, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like things are not exactly rosy here either, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, finding any place untouched in a crisis like this would be the real miracle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, finding any place untouched in a crisis like this would be the real miracle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, finding any place untouched in a crisis like this would be the real miracle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? And you are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? And you are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? And you are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Frizzy, prickly hair, hollow eyes, skin gone pale from never seeing sunlight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Frizzy, prickly hair, hollow eyes, skin gone pale from never seeing sunlight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Frizzy, prickly hair, hollow eyes, skin gone pale from never seeing sunlight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And above all, a killer body that can drop 'em in seconds!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And above all, a killer body that can drop 'em in seconds!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And above all, a killer body that can drop 'em in seconds!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Matches the description I heard of the Senior to a tee!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Matches the description I heard of the Senior to a tee!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Matches the description I heard of the Senior to a tee!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pleased to meet you. Name's Mi Rinae.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pleased to meet you. Name's Mi Rinae.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pleased to meet you. Name's Mi Rinae.
